equivalenceRuleSet: The rendered artifact must preserve the declared node order.
The rendered artifact must preserve the declared edge sequence.
The rendered artifact must preserve the declared labels without creative renaming.
The rendered artifact must not introduce new narrative authority.
The rendered artifact must remain a projection of the target sketch, not a new source truth.

connectorRules: Use a single arrow connector between each adjacent node pair.
No connector may skip over a declared node.
No alternate connector glyphs may be invented.
No connector may imply runtime behavior.
spacingRules: Use even spacing between each node group.
Keep the flow readable in a monospace canvas.
Do not wrap any node label across lines.
boxRules: No boxes or borders are required for the target definition.
If a future renderer uses boxes, they must remain label-neutral and cannot change node order.
